---
name: tactic-selection-engine
description: Use when choosing campaign tactics from the Markdown tactic library.
---
# Tactic Selection Engine

## Rule

Choose tactics by buyer state, proof available, channel fit, and measurement objective.

## Process

1. Read `deep_research/001_advertising_effectiveness_synthesis.md`.
2. Read buyer-state diagnosis.
3. Search `tactics_deep/` for tactics matching the state.
4. Select one primary tactic and one proof tactic.
5. Explain why rejected tactics were not selected.

## Output

```markdown
# Tactic Selection

## Buyer state
## Primary tactic
## Proof tactic
## Channel fit
## Why these tactics
## Why not other tactics
## Required assets
## Metrics
```
